name: Pickling Spice with Cayenne (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine equal parts of the spices listed above in a large muslin bag or measure out each spice individually using the substituted amounts (25 g or 15 g per pound).
2. Tie the bag securely to prevent spillage during pickling.
3. Use the spice mixture for chutneys, pickled fruits and vegetables, or to flavor vinegar.
4. Remove the bag before serving if desired, or add the spices directly to the vinegar.
5. Adjust quantities according to personal taste preferences.
